texto: Chinese commentaries stress the opportunity that the investments and aid they offer presents to developing countries to avoid the hazards of reliance on Western dominated financial institutions: austerity programs that call for severe cuts in state-subsidized social welfare, deregulation of state-owned facilities, trade liberalization, and an open door for multinational corporation investment.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Melvin Gurtov sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Chinese commentaries stress the opportunity that the investments and aid they offer presents to d…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, beijing-consensus, development-model, útil em momentos de development-model e economics.
